workspace = "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/minimax_m2.5/pinchbench/mongol_empire/20260325T115111Z/workspaces/task_00_sanity/run_01"

# 验证文件已创建

print(f"File content: {open(response_file).read()}")
